schema_diagram.description: Entity-Relationship diagram showing database schema and relationships
schema_diagram.content:
erDiagram
    PATIENT ||--o{ LABORATORY : "has"
    PATIENT ||--o{ EXAMINATION : "has"

    PATIENT {
        int ID PK
        text SEX
        datetime Birthday
        datetime Description
        datetime First Date
        text Admission
        text Diagnosis
    }
    EXAMINATION {
        int ID FK
        datetime Examination Date
        float aCL IgG
        float aCL IgM
        int ANA
        text ANA Pattern
        int aCL IgA
        text Diagnosis
        text KCT
        text RVVT
        text LAC
        text Symptoms
        int Thrombosis
    }
    LABORATORY {
        int ID PK,FK
        datetime Date PK
        int GOT
        int GPT
        int LDH
        int ALP
        float TP
        float ALB
        float UA
        int UN
        float CRE
        float T-BIL
        int T-CHO
        int TG
        int CPK
        int GLU
        float WBC
        float RBC
        float HGB
        float HCT
        int PLT
        float PT
        int APTT
        float FG
        int PIC
        int TAT
        int TAT2
        text U-PRO
        int IGG
        int IGA
        int IGM
        text CRP
        text RA
        text RF
        int C3
        int C4
        text RNP
        text SM
        text SC170
        text SSA
        text SSB
        text CENTROMEA
        text DNA
        int DNA-II
    }

ANA_meaning.content: Antinuclear Antibody titer result; values are dilution factors (powers of 2); 0 = negative/not detected

Laboratory.name: Laboratory
Laboratory.description: The Laboratory table stores patient laboratory test results, primarily for autoimmune and inflammatory markers such as RA, RF, CRP, and various autoantibodies, along with urine protein levels, to support clinical diagnosis and monitoring.

quality_issues.description: TEXT field storing numeric values (85% numeric, 121/143 non-empty)
TEXT field storing numeric values (84% numeric, 108/128 non-empty)
TEXT field storing numeric values (100% numeric, 69/69 non-empty)

Patient.name: Patient
Patient.description: The Patient table stores core demographic and admission-type information for 1,238 patients, primarily tracking gender distribution and the nature of their hospital admissions (Emergency, Scheduled, or Urgent).

quality_issues.description: Contains 13 empty string values in addition to NULLs
Contains 34 empty string values in addition to NULLs
Contains 1 empty string values in addition to NULLs
